traits.summary: When you roll a 1 on a d20 for an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, reroll it.
traits.description: When you roll a 1 on the d20 of a D20 Test, you can reroll the die, and you must use the new roll.

traits.summary: You have Advantage on saving throws against being Frightened.
traits.description: You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Frightened condition.

traits.summary: You can move through spaces of creatures larger than you.
traits.description: You can move through the space of any creature that is of a size larger than yours, and doing so doesn't count as Difficult Terrain for you.

traits.summary: You can Hide while obscured by a creature at least one size larger.
traits.description: You can take the Hide action even when obscured only by a creature that is at least one size larger than you.

flavorText: Halflings are known for warm hearths, deep community ties, and finding joy in simple comforts. Their kindness often hides remarkable courage when danger threatens loved ones. Travelers quickly learn that halfling hospitality and stubborn resolve are equally real.
roleplayNotes: Ground your character in community—family dinners, neighborhood obligations, and a personal promise worth protecting.
